assertion_results.text: The response identifies that the Implementation Notes section is missing from the task description and flags this as a gap requiring clarification (constraint 1.6)
assertion_results.evidence: Section '1. Implementation Notes section is missing entirely' in response.md (lines 11-13) explicitly states: 'The task description does not include an Implementation Notes section. This section is required and should provide technical guidance...' and flags it as blocking clarification under the heading 'Status: Blocked -- Clarification Required'.

assertion_results.text: The response identifies that the Acceptance Criteria are vague — specifically calling out 'search results are relevant' and 'performance is acceptable' as insufficiently specific for implementation
assertion_results.evidence: Section '2. Acceptance Criteria are vague and not implementation-ready' in response.md (lines 15-23) explicitly calls out both criteria: '"Search results are relevant" -- This is insufficiently specific.' (line 19) and '"Performance is acceptable" -- This is insufficiently specific.' (line 21).

assertion_results.text: The response identifies that the Test Requirements are vague — 'test that search works correctly' does not define what 'correctly' means
assertion_results.evidence: Section '3. Test Requirements are vague and untestable as stated' in response.md (lines 25-27) states: 'The sole test requirement -- "Test that search works correctly" -- does not define what "correctly" means.'

assertion_results.text: The response asks the user for clarification rather than improvising implementation details — it does not proceed to write a full implementation plan (constraint 1.6)
assertion_results.evidence: The response is explicitly titled 'Status: Blocked -- Clarification Required' (line 3). It contains a 'Clarifying Questions' section (lines 31-43) with 5 questions. The 'Next Steps' section (lines 47-55) states: 'Once these questions are answered, I will: 1. Draft a complete implementation plan...' and concludes with 'I will not proceed until the missing information is provided.' (line 55). No implementation plan is written.

assertion_results.text: The response asks at least 3 specific clarifying questions about: which fields to search, what relevance ranking means, and what performance threshold is required
assertion_results.evidence: The 'Clarifying Questions' section (lines 31-43) asks 5 questions, including: (1) 'Which package fields should be searchable?' (line 35), (2) 'What does "relevant" mean for search result ranking?' (line 37), and (3) 'What is the concrete performance threshold?' (line 39). All three required topics are covered with specific, detailed questions.
